title: Orange EV Fleet Surpasses 10 Million Hours of Zero-Emission Operation
content: Orange EV, the U.S.-based pioneer and leading manufacturer of 100% electric terminal trucks, has announced that its deployed fleet has surpassed 10 million operating hours, establishing itself as the most proven and widely adopted heavy-duty EV solution in North America. Since delivering its first truck in 2015, the company has deployed more than 1,600 trucks across 40 U.S. states and four Canadian provinces, logging nearly 27 million miles and eliminating around 200,000 tons of COâ‚‚ emissions. These trucks have also helped fleets save an estimated $100 million in fuel and maintenance costs compared to diesel yard trucks. With an impressive 97% uptime across 340 customers, Orange EV trucks are demonstrating superior reliability, longevity, and performance, with multiple units already surpassing 30,000 operating hours and approaching a decade of continuous useâ€”all while still running on their original Orange EV-designed LFP battery packs. Remarkably, in over 10 million hours of operation, no Orange EV battery has experienced a thermal event, further proving their safety and resilience. The companyâ€™s flagship e-TRIEVER, backed by an industry-leading 7.5-year warranty, is boosting customer confidence and accelerating the transition to EV fleets by offering a comprehensive turnkey solution covering trucks, chargers, and service.
author: Analysts Account
